inputs.label: Beam Span (L)
inputs.businessContext: Clear distance between supports for a simply supported beam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Clear distance between supports for a simply supported beam.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Basit mesnetli bir kiriş için mesnetler arası net mesafe.

inputs.label: Uniformly Distributed Load (w)
inputs.businessContext: Load applied evenly along the full length of the beam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Load applied evenly along the full length of the beam.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kirişin tüm uzunluğu boyunca eşit olarak uygulanan yük.

inputs.label: Allowable Bending Stress (σ_allow)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum permissible stress for the beam material under bending.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum permissible stress for the beam material under bending.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiriş malzemesinin eğilme altında izin verilen maksimum gerilmesi.

inputs.label: Modulus of Elasticity (E)
inputs.businessContext: Young's modulus of the beam material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Young's modulus of the beam material.

inputs.label: Deflection Limit Ratio (L/δ)
inputs.businessContext: Allowable deflection expressed as span divided by this ratio (e.g., 360 means L/360).

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowable deflection expressed as span divided by this ratio (e.g., 360 means L/360).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Açıklığın bu orana bölünmesiyle ifade edilen izin verilen sehim (örn. 360, L/360 anlamına gelir).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
